name: Encrypted Payload - Roundtrip Verification
description: Roundtrip encrypt-then-MAC verification vectors. Each vector provides full key material enabling implementations to verify: (1) encryption produces the given ciphertext, (2) MAC computation produces the given MAC, (3) MAC verification succeeds, (4) decryption recovers the plaintext.

vectors.description: Roundtrip: encrypt 'Hello', verify MAC, decrypt back
vectors.notes: Verification steps: (1) AES-128-ECB encrypt(key=00..0F, pad('Hello')) -> D9FD...3502. (2) HMAC-SHA256(key=00..1F, ct)[:2] -> EAB5. (3) HMAC verify: recompute and compare. (4) AES-128-ECB decrypt -> 48656C6C6F + 11 zero bytes.

vectors.description: Roundtrip with wrong MAC must fail verification
vectors.notes: Same ciphertext as rt-enc-001 but MAC replaced with FFFF. MACThenDecrypt must return 0 (failure).
